lines.speaker: Tea Seller
lines.text: Greetings! Are you in need of refreshment?

lines.speaker: Tea Seller
lines.text: Only the most delicious infusion of the leaves of the tea plant. Grown in the exotic regions of this world. Buy yourself a cup !

lines.speaker: Tea Seller
lines.text: Well, if you're sure. You know where to come if you do!

sections.title: Catching the player trying to steal from his tea stall

lines.speaker: Tea Seller
lines.text: Hey! Get your hands off there!

sections.title: Interacting with him after stealing from his tea stall recently

lines.speaker: Tea Seller
lines.text: You're the one who stole something from me!
